RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Aspect ratio 16:9 full frame, no borders, no black bars. | TONE: Peaceful, nostalgic, Ghibli-esque, cozy, heartwarming | RENDERING RULES | - Each scene features ONLY the characters and objects explicitly mentioned in that scene. | - No other characters or objects from this list appear unless directly named in the scene. | - Do NOT include background cameos or crowd shots of unrelated characters. | - Do NOT mix, merge, or hybridize character or object designs between scenes. | - Characters and objects not referenced in the scene must be completely absent from the frame. | - Always isolate the active subjects in the composition. | CHARACTERS AND OBJECTS (LOCKED): | - Satsuki Sato: human, female, 20, Slender but capable, athletic posture, slightly calloused hands from farm work, Soft oval face, large expressive hazel eyes, small straight nose, warm and gentle smile, Dark espresso brown, shoulder-length, tied back in a low loose ponytail with a blue ribbon, Cream-colored linen tunic with rolled-up sleeves and a sage green apron, Loose-fitting indigo hakama-style trousers | - Mei Sato: human, female, 5, Small, sturdy child build with chubby 'mochi' cheeks and energetic movements, Round face, wide sparkling brown eyes, tiny button nose, constant look of wonder, Short, choppy bob with two small pigtails held by yellow spheres, Bright yellow sundress over a white puffy-sleeved shirt, White bloomers peeking from under the dress | - Obaasan Sato: human, female, 70, Slightly hunched, small frame, lean and wiry from years of gardening, Deeply wrinkled 'map of life' face, squinting kind eyes, thin lips, high cheekbones, Wispy silver-white hair gathered in a tight bun at the nape of the neck, Dark grey kimono-style work jacket (Hippari) with a faded floral pattern, Matching dark grey trousers | - Mochi: animal (dog), male, Senior, Fluffy, round Shiba Inu with a thick neck and curled tail, Classic 'smiling' Shiba face, black triangular nose, white mask markings around eyes, Thick, plush ginger-orange fur with a cream-colored belly (Urajiro), A simple red fabric collar with a small brass bell, N/A | ENVIRONMENT (GLOBAL): | - Cinematic establishing environment for the project. | CHARACTERS (LOCKED): | SCENE 1: The Sea of Mist | ENVIRONMENT (SCENE): | - Location: The Misty Valley Marsh. | - Scenery: Rolling hills submerged in thick, opaque white mist; dark jagged cedar peaks rising above the vapor. | - Atmosphere: Heavy, motionless morning air with cool blue and silver tones. | IMAGE: | - The frame is filled with swirling white mist; the silhouettes of three sharp mountain peaks are visible in the top third of the frame. | CAMERA: | - RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Aspect ratio 16:9 full frame, no borders, no black bars. | TONE: Peaceful, nostalgic, Ghibli-dream, cozy, sensory | RENDERING RULES | - Each scene features ONLY the characters and objects explicitly mentioned in that scene. | - No other characters or objects from this list appear unless directly named in the scene. | - Do NOT include background cameos or crowd shots of unrelated characters. | - Do NOT mix, merge, or hybridize character or object designs between scenes. | - Characters and objects not referenced in the scene must be completely absent from the frame. | - Always isolate the active subjects in the composition. | CHARACTERS AND OBJECTS (LOCKED): | - Hanako Sato: human, female, 20, Slender but capable, slightly athletic frame from farm work, Soft oval face, large expressive amber eyes, small straight nose, gentle smile, Dark espresso brown, shoulder-length, tied back in a low loose ponytail with a blue ribbon, Cream-colored linen blouse with puffed sleeves and delicate embroidery at the collar, Forest green high-waisted wide-leg trousers | - RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. No other characters or objects from this list appear unless directly named in the scene. | - Do NOT include background cameos or crowd shots of unrelated characters. | - Do NOT mix, merge, or hybridize character or object designs between scenes. | - Characters and objects not referenced in the scene must be completely absent from the frame. | - Always isolate the active subjects in the composition. | CHARACTERS AND OBJECTS (LOCKED): | - Hanako Sato: human, female, 20, Slender but capable, slightly athletic frame from farm work, Soft oval face, large expressive amber eyes, small straight nose, gentle smile, Dark espresso brown, shoulder-length, tied back in a low loose ponytail with a blue ribbon, Cream-colored linen blouse with puffed sleeves and delicate embroidery at the collar, Forest green high-waisted wide-leg trousers | - Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Aspect ratio 16:9 full frame, no borders, no black bars. | TONE: Peaceful, nostalgic, Ghibli-dream, cozy, sensory | RENDERING RULES | - Each scene features ONLY the characters and objects explicitly mentioned in that scene. | - No other characters or objects from this list appear unless directly named in the scene. | - Do NOT include background cameos or crowd shots of unrelated characters. | - Do NOT mix, merge, or hybridize character or object designs between scenes. | - Characters and objects not referenced in the scene must be completely absent from the frame. | - Always isolate the active subjects in the composition. | CHARACTERS AND OBJECTS (LOCKED): | - Hanako Sato: human, female, 20, Slender but capable, slightly athletic frame from farm work, Soft oval face, large expressive amber eyes, small straight nose, gentle smile, Dark espresso brown, shoulder-length, tied back in a low loose ponytail with a blue ribbon, Cream-colored linen blouse with puffed sleeves and delicate embroidery at the collar, Forest green high-waisted wide-leg trousers | - RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. No other characters or objects from this list appear unless directly named in the scene. | - Do NOT include background cameos or crowd shots of unrelated characters. | - Do NOT mix, merge, or hybridize character or object designs between scenes. | - RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Aspect ratio 16:9 full frame, no borders, no black bars. | TONE: Peaceful, nostalgic, Ghibli-esque, cozy, heartwarming | RENDERING RULES | - Each scene features ONLY the characters and objects explicitly mentioned in that scene. | - No other characters or objects from this list appear unless directly named in the scene. | - Do NOT include background cameos or crowd shots of unrelated characters. | - Do NOT mix, merge, or hybridize character or object designs between scenes. | - Characters and objects not referenced in the scene must be completely absent from the frame. | - Always isolate the active subjects in the composition. | CHARACTERS AND OBJECTS (LOCKED): | - Hanako Sato: human, female, 20, Slender and graceful, medium height, slightly calloused hands from crafting, Soft oval face, large expressive amber eyes, small button nose, gentle smile, Dark mahogany brown, bob-cut with straight bangs, often tucked behind ears, Oversized cream-colored knit sweater over a white collared shirt, Long, pleated forest green wool skirt | - RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. No other characters or objects from this list appear unless directly named in the scene. | - Do NOT include background cameos or crowd shots of unrelated characters. | - Do NOT mix, merge, or hybridize character or object designs between scenes. | - RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Aspect ratio 16:9 full frame, no borders, no black bars. | TONE: Peaceful, nostalgic, Ghibli-esque, cozy, sensory-rich | RENDERING RULES | - Each scene features ONLY the characters and objects explicitly mentioned in that scene. | - No other characters or objects from this list appear unless directly named in the scene. | - Do NOT include background cameos or crowd shots of unrelated characters. | - Do NOT mix, merge, or hybridize character or object designs between scenes. | - Characters and objects not referenced in the scene must be completely absent from the frame. | - Always isolate the active subjects in the composition. | CHARACTERS AND OBJECTS (LOCKED): | - Hanako Sato: human, female, 20, Slender, graceful, slightly calloused hands from crafting, Soft oval face, large expressive hazel eyes, small straight nose, gentle smile, Dark brown, bob-cut with straight bangs, often tucked behind ears, Cream-colored thick knit turtleneck sweater under a forest green wool apron, Brown corduroy trousers | - Kenji Sato: human, male, 5, Small, energetic, round belly, short limbs, Round 'mochi' face, wide coal-black eyes, tiny button nose, Messy black bowl cut, Bright yellow padded winter jacket over a striped shirt, Navy blue overalls | - Obaasan (Grandmother): human, female, 70, Slightly hunched, small stature, moves slowly but steadily, Deeply wrinkled 'smiling' eyes, thin lips, kind expression, Silver-white, tied back in a neat low bun with a wooden pin, Indigo quilted 'hanten' jacket over a grey kimono, Dark grey hakama-style work pants | - Mochi: cat, male, 8, Plump, fluffy, resembles a round loaf of bread, Wide face, green eyes, pink nose, long whiskers, Calico (white with orange and black patches), thick winter fur, Red collar with a tiny brass bell, N/A | ENVIRONMENT (GLOBAL): | - Cinematic establishing environment for the project. | CHARACTERS (LOCKED): | SCENE 09: The Golden Tuber | ENVIRONMENT (SCENE): | - [MORNING] - The Winter Garden & Forest Edge | - Close-up of the bamboo basket weave | - Soft golden sunlight catching dust motes in the air | IMAGE: | - Hanako holds a muddy potato in her left hand. The bamboo basket is in the lower half of the frame. | CAMERA: | - Lens: 50mm f/1.4 | - Focus: Shallow DoF on the potato skin and Hanako’s thumb

RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Aspect ratio 16:9 full frame, no borders, no black bars. | TONE: Peaceful, nostalgic, Ghibli-esque, cozy, sensory-rich | RENDERING RULES | - Each scene features ONLY the characters and objects explicitly mentioned in that scene. | - No other characters or objects from this list appear unless directly named in the scene. | - Do NOT include background cameos or crowd shots of unrelated characters. | - Do NOT mix, merge, or hybridize character or object designs between scenes. | - Characters and objects not referenced in the scene must be completely absent from the frame. | - Always isolate the active subjects in the composition. | CHARACTERS AND OBJECTS (LOCKED): | - Hanako Sato: human, female, 20, Slender, graceful, slightly calloused hands from crafting, Soft oval face, large expressive hazel eyes, small straight nose, gentle smile, Dark brown, bob-cut with straight bangs, often tucked behind ears, Cream-colored thick knit turtleneck sweater under a forest green wool apron, Brown corduroy trousers | - Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Aspect ratio 16:9 full frame, no borders, no black bars. | TONE: Peaceful, nostalgic, Ghibli-esque, cozy, sensory-rich | RENDERING RULES | - Each scene features ONLY the characters and objects explicitly mentioned in that scene. | - No other characters or objects from this list appear unless directly named in the scene. | - Do NOT include background cameos or crowd shots of unrelated characters. | - Do NOT mix, merge, or hybridize character or object designs between scenes. | - Characters and objects not referenced in the scene must be completely absent from the frame. | - Always isolate the active subjects in the composition. | CHARACTERS AND OBJECTS (LOCKED): | - Hanako Sato: human, female, 20, Slender, graceful, slightly calloused hands from crafting, Soft oval face, large expressive hazel eyes, small straight nose, gentle smile, Dark brown, bob-cut with straight bangs, often tucked behind ears, Cream-colored thick knit turtleneck sweater under a forest green wool apron, Brown corduroy trousers | - Kenji Sato: human, male, 5, Small, energetic, round belly, short limbs, Round 'mochi' face, wide coal-black eyes, tiny button nose, Messy black bowl cut, Bright yellow padded winter jacket over a striped shirt, Navy blue overalls | - Obaasan (Grandmother): human, female, 70, Slightly hunched, small stature, moves slowly but steadily, Deeply wrinkled 'smiling' eyes, thin lips, kind expression, Silver-white, tied back in a neat low bun with a wooden pin, Indigo quilted 'hanten' jacket over a grey kimono, Dark grey hakama-style work pants | - Mochi: cat, male, 8, Plump, fluffy, resembles a round loaf of bread, Wide face, green eyes, pink nose, long whiskers, Calico (white with orange and black patches), thick winter fur, Red collar with a tiny brass bell, N/A | ENVIRONMENT (GLOBAL): | - Cinematic establishing environment for the project. | CHARACTERS (LOCKED): | SCENE 37: The First Stitch | ENVIRONMENT (SCENE): | - [AFTERNOON] - The Sunken Hearth Room (Irori). RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. RATIO: 16:9 | STYLE: Studio Ghibli inspired animation style by Hayao Miyazaki, hand-drawn 2D anime with lush painterly watercolor backgrounds, warm earthy and pastel color palette (soft greens, sky blues, golden yellows, warm umbers). Characters designed with simple expressive faces, large bright eyes, round gentle features, detailed flowing hair and fabric movement. Environments feature rolling countryside, ancient forests, rustic villages, dramatic cloudscapes, and cozy interiors with rich natural textures. Lighting is soft and diffused — golden-hour warmth, dappled sunlight through leaves, glowing lanterns at dusk. Atmosphere is nostalgic, peaceful, heartwarming, and slightly magical. Subtle ambient animation: swaying grass, drifting clouds, flickering fire, gentle water ripples. Frame-by-frame hand-drawn motion with gentle easing. Style reference: My Neighbor Totoro, Spirited Away, Howls Moving Castle, Princess Mononoke. NOT 3D, NOT CGI, NOT photorealistic, NOT live-action. Obaasan (Grandmother): human, female, 70, Slightly hunched, small stature, moves slowly but steadily, Deeply wrinkled 'smiling' eyes, thin lips, kind expression, Silver-white, tied back in a neat low bun with a wooden pin, Indigo quilted 'hanten' jacket over a grey kimono, Dark grey hakama-style work pants | - Mochi: cat, male, 8, Plump, fluffy, resembles a round loaf of bread, Wide face, green eyes, pink nose, long whiskers, Calico (white with orange and black patches), thick winter fur, Red collar with a tiny brass bell, N/A | ENVIRONMENT (GLOBAL): | -
